sentences.grammar_note: Die Kunst is feminine nominative (subject); predicate adjective schön takes no ending after ist.
Accusative of feminine die Kunst is identical to nominative — the article does not change for feminine nouns.
Eine Kunst uses the feminine indefinite article; this construction defines or categorizes something.

sentences.german: Die Kunst im Museum ist sehr interessant.
sentences.english: The art in the museum is very interesting.
sentences.grammar_note: Im = in + dem (dative contraction); die Kunst remains nominative as subject of ist.

sentences.german: Wir sehen die Kunst in der Galerie.
sentences.english: We see the art in the gallery.
sentences.grammar_note: Die Kunst is accusative direct object; in der Galerie is dative (in + der, feminine dative article).

sentences.german: Die Künste in Wien sind sehr bekannt.
sentences.english: The arts in Vienna are very well known.
sentences.grammar_note: Die Künste is the nominative plural form; plural subjects take sind (not ist); Wien takes no article.

sentences.german: Ich habe die Kunst in der Galerie sehr schön gefunden.
sentences.english: I found the art in the gallery very beautiful.
sentences.grammar_note: Perfekt: habe + gefunden (past participle of finden at the end); die Kunst is accusative object.

sentences.german: Du kannst die Kunst im Museum jeden Tag sehen.
sentences.english: You can see the art in the museum every day.
sentences.grammar_note: Modal verb kannst sends the infinitive sehen to the end; jeden Tag is an accusative time expression.

sentences.german: Die Künste in dieser Stadt sind alt und sehr schön.
sentences.english: The arts in this city are old and very beautiful.
sentences.grammar_note: Dieser Stadt is dative feminine (in + dieser); two predicate adjectives joined by und, both undeclined.

sentences.german: Wir haben viele Künste im Museum gesehen und viel gelernt.
sentences.english: We saw many arts at the museum and learned a lot.
sentences.grammar_note: Perfekt with two past participles (gesehen, gelernt) sharing the auxiliary haben; viele Künste is accusative plural.
